name: CSP INC /MA/
summary: CSP Inc. (CSPI), incorporated in 1968 and based in Lowell, Massachusetts, operates in two segments: Technology Solutions (TS) and High Performance Products (HPP). The TS segment, through subsidiary Modcomp Inc., resells third-party hardware/software and delivers professional IT, managed, and cloud services in the US and UK. The HPP segment offers the ARIA Software-Defined Security portfolio, Myricom SmartNIC network adapters, and legacy Multicomputer DSP products for defense, commercial, and government customers.

products.name: ARIA Packet Intelligence
products.description: High-speed wire-rate in-line packet filtering, steering and policy enforcement software.

products.name: ARIA Advanced Detection and Response (ADR)
products.description: Real-time threat detection and response solution automating the MITRE ATT&CK framework.

products.name: ARIA Zero Trust (AZT) PROTECT
products.description: Launched July 2023; stops sophisticated attacks on critical infrastructure before harm occurs.

products.name: Myricom ARC Series SmartNIC
products.description: High-bandwidth, low-latency network adapters; reached end-of-life due to ASIC supplier problems.

products.name: Myricom Secure Intelligent Adapters (SIA)
products.description: Intelligent network adapters optimized for packet capture, financial transactions, machine vision, and network security.

products.name: Multicomputer Products
products.description: Legacy DSP hardware for defense markets; no longer actively developed, sold through fiscal year 2025.

products.name: Managed IT Services (MSP)
products.description: Monitoring, reporting, and management of IT infrastructure primarily for SMB customers.

products.name: Professional IT Services
products.description: Assessments, HCI, virtualization, enterprise security, unified communications, and compliance consulting services.

products.name: Managed and Hosted Unified Communication as a Service
products.description: Cisco-based communication and collaboration managed cloud service offering.

partnerships.description: Key hardware and networking product reseller relationship.
Cisco Premier Partner approved for Cloud and Managed Services Program for Managed Business Communications.
Reseller partnership for advanced IT security hardware and software solutions.
Partner for HCI and data center infrastructure solutions.
Partner for wireless, routing, and switching solutions.
Microsoft Gold Partner with specialties in Cloud and Collaboration solutions.
Reseller partner for enterprise security solutions.
Reseller partner for IT security products.
Reseller partner for networking and security solutions.
Reseller partner for data security solutions.
